queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of maintaining no checking account on consumer default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with critical credit history or multiple existing credits as protective factors in credit risk assessment.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances function as credit risk drivers that reduce the likelihood of loan default.
